subcodes.first_line: O cherished and affectionate friend! Your noble letter, which bore testimony to your sincere love and purity of intention, was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیز مهربان دستخط شریف که دلیل بر حب صمیمی و خلوص نیت بود ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @newspapers and the media; publications
